dialog.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
dialog.description: Browse the active shortcuts and their current bindings.

platformHint: Shortcuts are rendered in platform format, such as ⌘ on macOS.

openCommandPalette.label: Open command palette
openCommandPalette.description: Search pages and common actions, then run them directly.

goCreator.label: Go to Creator
goCreator.description: Navigate to the prescription creation page.

goConsumer.label: Go to Consumer
goConsumer.description: Navigate to the prescription query page.

toggleTheme.label: Toggle theme
toggleTheme.description: Cycle between light, dark, and system theme.

toggleLocale.label: Toggle locale
toggleLocale.description: Switch between Chinese and English UI.

prevStep.label: Previous step
prevStep.description: Move to the previous Creator step.

nextStep.label: Next step
nextStep.description: Move to the next Creator step.

firstStep.label: First step
firstStep.description: Jump to the first resource step.

lastStep.label: Last step
lastStep.description: Jump to the final document bundle step.

submitStep.label: Submit current step
submitStep.description: Submit the current form and create the current resource.

fillMock.label: Fill mock data
fillMock.description: Quickly fill mock data for the current step.

toggleRightPanel.label: Toggle right panel
toggleRightPanel.description: Show or hide the JSON / FHIR request side panel.

toggleRightPanelMode.label: Toggle right panel mode
toggleRightPanelMode.description: Switch between Resources JSON and FHIR Request.

toggleLiveDemo.label: Toggle Live Demo
toggleLiveDemo.description: Start or stop the guided Live Demo flow.

toggleFeatureShowcase.label: Toggle Feature Showcase
toggleFeatureShowcase.description: Start or stop the spotlight-based feature tour.

focusSearch.label: Focus search field
focusSearch.description: Move focus to the main input of the active search tab.

showShortcuts.label: Show shortcuts
showShortcuts.description: Switch to the Query Helpers tab.

importBundle.label: Import Bundle JSON
importBundle.description: Import a local FHIR Bundle JSON file.

fillExample.label: Apply query example
fillExample.description: Fill an example query for the active search tab.

toggleDetailView.label: Toggle detail view
toggleDetailView.description: Switch between structured detail and JSON view.

save.label: Save settings
save.description: Save the current FHIR server settings.

testConnection.label: Test connection
testConnection.description: Run a connection check against the current server URL.

tabServer.label: Open Server tab
tabServer.description: Show the FHIR server configuration tab.

tabShortcuts.label: Open Keyboard Shortcuts tab
tabShortcuts.description: Show the keyboard shortcut settings tab.

settings.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
settings.description: Review, customize, and resolve shortcut bindings in one place.
settings.recordingHint: Press the new key combination now. Press Esc to cancel.
settings.alreadyDefault: {{action}} is already using its default binding: {{binding}}.
settings.resetAllDone: All customized shortcuts were restored to their default bindings.
settings.resetAllAlreadyDefault: All shortcuts are already using their default bindings.

conflicts.invalid: Use a valid shortcut with at least one modifier key.
conflicts.reserved: This shortcut is reserved for common system actions. Please choose another one.
conflicts.duplicate: This shortcut is already used by: {{action}}
